changes.description: Decoupled CLI from Core and Storage layers: remove internal click output, delegating UI responsibilities to the CLI module.
Replaced Flake8 and MyPy with Ruff. Adopted linting and formatting rules of the Ruff project.
Upgrade dependencies: click to 8.3.x, pytest to 9.x, pytest-cov to 7.x, importlib_resources to 7.x, mypy to 1.20.x, and flake8 to 7.3.x.
Added AGENTS.md with AI guidelines and project overview.
Migrated project configuration to pyproject.toml and simplified installation process.
Update GitHub Actions to the latest version, and upgrade all dependencies.
Converted Tests to use pytest syntax and fixtures.
Improved README.md documentation with missing commands and examples.
